mapper.insert: INSERT INTO login_log ( subject_id, portal_type, client_code, sid, event_type, business_domain_id, login_name, login_identifier_masked, login_identifier_type, ip, user_agent, result, fail_reason, created_at ) VALUES (#{subjectId}, #{portalType}, #{clientCode}, #{sid}, #{eventType}, #{businessDomainId}, #{loginName}, #{loginIdentifierMasked}, #{loginIdentifierType}, #{ip}, #{userAgent}, #{result}, #{failReason}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT l.id, l.sid, l.subject_id, l.login_name, l.login_identifier_masked, l.login_identifier_type, l.event_type, l.portal_type, l.client_code, l.business_domain_id, l.result, l.fail_reason, l.ip, l.user_agent, l.created_at FROM login_log l WHERE l.event_type = #{eventType} ORDER BY l.created_at DESC, l.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT subject_id FROM customer_account WHERE id = #{customerAccountId} LIMIT 1
